title: Join The Breakverse
description: The Breakverse is ConsumerBreak's unified community ecosystem. One account connects you to all 30 Breakery apps, earns points across BrandBreak campaigns, tracks your NFT holdings, and builds your reputation across every platform we touch. Stream prizes, NFT drops, app leaderboards, and community tournaments — all tied to one identity.
